ham.subject: Azure Service Health – Scheduled Maintenance for Storage Accounts (Oct 12‑14)
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a notification from the Azure Trust Center regarding upcoming maintenance for our Storage Accounts in the East US region.

**Maintenance Window:**
- **Start:** Friday, October 12, 2024 02:00 UTC
- **End:** Sunday, October 14, 2024 04:00 UTC

**Impact:**
- Read–only operations will be available.
- Write operations may experience intermittent latency.
- Services dependent on these Storage Accounts should perform any critical write operations before the start time.

We recommend reviewing your applications and scheduling backups ahead of the maintenance window. For detailed guidance on how to prepare, please visit the Azure Maintenance Release Notes at <URL>.

If you have any questions or need assistance adjusting workloads, contact the Cloud Operations team.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Cloud Ops Team
Azure Trust Center

spam.subject: URGENT: YOUR AZURE ACCOUNT WILL BE TERMINATED – ACT NOW!
spam.body:
Dear ACCOUNT OWNER,

WITNESSING INCONVENIENT STATUS! Your Microsoft Azure account is in violation of our Terms of Service and has NOT BEEN ACCEPTED by KYOS for PROVISIONING. Failure to comply MAY RESULT IN permanent ACCOUNT TERMINATION within 48 HOURS.

PLEASE REVIEW YOUR ACCOUNT STATUS AT THIS LINK IMMEDIATELY: <URL>

YOU MUST CLICK THE LINK, ENTER YOUR EMAIL AND PASSWORD 
AND CONFIRM YOUR REPORTED PROMPTLY PAYMENTS.

REMEMBER: ALL ACCOUNTS WITH PLUS 1000$ BALANCE WILL BE BLACKLISTED WITHOUT PREVIOUS WARNING.

TO AVOID THIS YOU MUST:
1. VERIFY IDENTIFICATION
2. ENDARY OBS ARE SPAFISH 
3. CONFIRM BONUS PAYMENT (If you DO NOT COMPLETE, IT WILL BE SUSPENDED.)

THIS IS A FINAL WARNING! 
ANY DELAY WILL RESULT IN LOSS OF YOUR CLOUD SERVICES. 

FOR MORE INFORMATION:
ARCFUN SUPPORT MANAGER
M: +1-800-555-1234 (GUEST OF THE DAY)

Regards,

Microsoft Azure
Security Team
